content:
OVERVIEW

In a Security Operations Center (SOC), if the network is a high-volume data landscape, the ELK Stack is your high-fidelity lens and your architectural blueprint. During my tenure with PISCES International, the role transcended mere monitoring. I acted as a Principal Architect of Observability, tasked with taking raw, high-volume telemetry and transforming it into high-fidelity actionable intelligence. In this ecosystem, 90% of the value was created through the mastery of the ELK Stack and the precision of the MantisBT ledger.

OPERATIONAL ARCHITECTURE

Semantic Search for Malice

Utilizing Kibana, I architected filters using KQL and Lucene to strip away the 'noise' of legitimate traffic. This is Status Propagation at the highest level-taking the 'Actual State' of a municipal network and visualizing its drift from the 'Desired Secure State.'

Temporal Correlation

Shifting the temporal lens from live monitoring to 30-day historical data to identify low-and-slow Advanced Persistent Threats (APTs). By correlating 'Leaky Abstractions' like minor IDS alerts with outbound spikes, I identified the 'Pioneer Paths' used by adversaries.

The Ledger of Declarative Fact

I utilized MantisBT as a Ledger of Truth for State Management. Every ticket was a structured document of remediation including Evidence, Methodology, and the 'Golden Path' for the solution, ensuring the 'Kitchen' (IT teams) received a clear recipe for infrastructure recovery.

Admission Control as Law

Protecting distributed municipal endpoints required enterprise-grade Admission Control. I architected correlative rules that automatically flagged irregularities, ensuring that the critical services small municipalities and schools rely on remained sovereign and uninterrupted.

THE BUILDER'S RESPONSIBILITY

As a Father, Creator, and Builder, I felt a deep sense of ownership over the safety of the 30+ public institutions we secured. My tenure at PISCES International was an exercise in Systems Sovereignty.

I learned that true security is found in the ability to correlate, visualize, and document with such precision that the complexity of the threat is entirely abstracted for the stakeholder. I love the challenge of being the Lead Builder of these observability ecosystems. Whether it is tuning a KQL query to find a needle in a haystack or utilizing MantisBT to enforce a remediation standard, I am building a world where public organizations can flourish in a 'Golden Path' of safety.

I am not just observing logs; I am the architect of the defensive perimeter that keeps the organization secure. Through the lens of a Senior Principal Lead, I ensure that every bit of metadata serves a purpose: the total protection of the community ecosystem.
